promoSubtitle: Kick off summer with smooth, glowing skin — limited-time savings

services.name: Aroma Express Facial with Aroma Body Scrub & Shower
services.description: Refresh from head to toe this Memorial Day! A hydrating aroma express facial paired with a soothing full-body aroma scrub and refreshing shower.
services.fullDescription:
Get summer-ready with a complete head-to-toe refresh. Begin with a soothing Aroma Body Scrub that gently exfoliates and leaves your skin silky smooth, followed by a refreshing shower. Finish with an Aroma Express Facial for a quick boost of hydration and radiance — the perfect reset to kick off the season.

Includes:
• Full-body aroma body scrub
• Refreshing shower
• Aroma express facial
• Light hydration and glow boost

services.name: Brazilian Laser Hair Removal
services.description: Get beach-ready! Complete bikini area laser hair removal for smooth, confident, summer-ready skin — now just $149.
services.fullDescription: Start your summer smooth with our Brazilian Laser treatment. This complete bikini area hair removal delivers long-lasting results, so you can enjoy the season without the hassle of shaving or waxing. Performed by experienced technicians in a private, comfortable setting.

services.name: Microdermabrasion Facial
services.description: Reveal fresh, glowing summer skin! Professional microdermabrasion that polishes away dullness and refines texture — now just $99.
services.fullDescription:
Reveal your brightest summer skin with our Microdermabrasion Facial. This specialized exfoliating treatment buffs away layers of dead skin, smoothing texture and minimizing imperfections like discoloration and fine lines. Skin is left polished, refreshed, and radiant.

Good for:
• Hyperpigmentation
• Enlarged or clogged pores
• Dull skin
• Rough texture

services.name: Sweet Mango Facial with Hand Treatment or Eyebrow Wax
services.description: A tropical treat for summer! Vitamin-rich mango facial plus your choice of a hand treatment or eyebrow wax — now just $89.
services.fullDescription:
Glow into summer with our Sweet Mango Facial — a vitamin-rich, hydrating treatment that nourishes and brightens for a healthy, radiant complexion. As a Memorial Day bonus, choose a complimentary add-on: a soothing hand treatment or a clean-up eyebrow wax.

Includes:
• Cleanser and toner
• Face, neck, and shoulder massage
• Mango exfoliation scrub
• Aroma steam
• Clarisonic brush cleanse
• Extraction
• Herbal eye treatment
• Mango hydration mask
• Your choice of hand treatment OR eyebrow wax
benefits: Rich in vitamins A, C, and E
Choice of hand treatment or brow wax
